creator: karsten@photor.de
text:
trying to install audio/audacity-devel I get the following error:

portmaster audio/audacity-devel

< ... several tries to download the source ... >

=> MD5 Checksum mismatch for audacity-fullsrc-1.3.7.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for audacity-fullsrc-1.3.7.tar.bz2.
===>  Giving up on fetching files: audacity-fullsrc-1.3.7.tar.bz2 audacity-fullsrc-1.3.7.tar.bz2 
Make sure the Makefile and distinfo file (/usr/ports/audio/audacity-devel/distinfo)
are up to date.  If you are absolutely sure you want to override this
check, type "make NO_CHECKSUM=yes [other args]".
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/audacity-devel.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/audacity-devel.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/audacity-devel.

===>>> make failed for audio/audacity-devel
===>>> Aborting update

Fix: 

correct source file at the right location

or even better

version 1.3.9 seems to be the latest.
How-To-Repeat: portmaster audio/audacity-devel
